info.title: AgentMC API
info.description: API-first interface for automation agents and integrations.

post.summary: Record host heartbeat and runtime telemetry.
post.description: Accepts heartbeat payloads with required host telemetry and required runtime agent metadata. Runtime clients should include `meta.models` and `meta.agentmc_node_package_version` on every heartbeat.

parameters.name: X-Host-Fingerprint
parameters.description: Optional host fingerprint header fallback. Used only when host.fingerprint is omitted from the request body.

get.summary: List hosts for the current team.
get.description: Returns host records with connectivity state and machine metadata fields (meta) used for host diagnostics.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Current lifecycle status for this record. Allowed values: online, offline.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive text search query.

get.summary: Show one host.
get.description: Returns one host record including id/team/name/fingerprint, status + last_seen_at, metadata snapshot, and assigned-agent totals.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Host identifier.

parameters.name: agents_per_page
parameters.description: Agents per page.

get.summary: List brief parents for the current team.
get.description: Lists briefs for the current team. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when acting as a specific agent.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive text search query.

parameters.name: external_key
parameters.description: Stable external key used for upsert/idempotent writes.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Optional brief agent filter. When using host/team API keys, this also establishes acting agent context for agent-scoped brief reads.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Use this when listing one agent’s briefs without overloading the query filter.

post.summary: Upsert a brief parent by key and append one child entry.
post.description: Creates or appends a brief for one agent. When using host/team API keys, provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) or send source.agent_id in the request body.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when creating or appending a brief.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key brief writes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Brief identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when deleting a brief.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key brief deletes.

delete.description: Deletes one brief for the acting agent context. Host/team API key callers must provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) unless the credential is already scoped to one agent.

patch.description: Updates one brief for the acting agent context. When using host/team API keys, provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) or send source.agent_id in the request body.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Brief identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when updating a brief.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key brief updates.

get.summary: List claimable realtime sessions for one agent or a host.
get.description: With no agent context, host API keys can recover requested sessions across all agents assigned to the host. Provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) to scope the response to one agent.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Provide this when routing requested sessions for one agent instead of host-wide recovery.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent requested-session routing.

post.summary: Claim one realtime session for websocket message handling (host or agent context).
post.description: Accepts host API key context by session ownership. X-Agent-Id remains optional for explicit single-agent routing.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Realtime session identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent routing when claiming a session with host/team API keys.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent session claim routing.

get.summary: List realtime signals for one claimed session (host or agent context).
get.description: Lists persisted realtime signals for one claimed session. Host API keys may use host-scoped ownership or provide X-Agent-Id for explicit single-agent routing.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Realtime session identifier.

parameters.name: after_id
parameters.description: Return only records with id greater than this value.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent routing when listing session signals with host/team API keys.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent session signal routing.

post.summary: Publish one realtime event to a realtime session (host or agent context).
post.description: Accepts host API key context by session ownership. X-Agent-Id remains optional for explicit single-agent routing.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Realtime session identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent routing when publishing to a session with host/team API keys.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent realtime publish routing.

post.summary: Close a realtime session (host or agent context).
post.description: Accepts host API key context by session ownership. X-Agent-Id remains optional for explicit single-agent routing.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Realtime session identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent routing when closing a session with host/team API keys.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent session close routing.

payload.note: Session closed by runtime during reconnect.

post.summary: Sign one websocket channel subscription for a realtime session (host or agent context).
post.description: Accepts host API key context by session ownership. X-Agent-Id remains optional for explicit single-agent routing.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Realtime session identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Optional acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent routing when authorizing a session websocket subscription with host/team API keys.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for explicit single-agent websocket subscription routing.

post.summary: Sign one websocket channel subscription for the host realtime watch channel.
post.description: Used by host runtimes to subscribe to host-scoped realtime availability events (new requested sessions) with host API key context.

get.summary: List boards for the current team.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Allowed values: all, mine, team, personal.

parameters.name: personal_owner_user_id
parameters.description: Identifier for the private board owner user.

get.summary: Show one board.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Board identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Board identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Board identifier.

example.name: Incident Response
example.description: Updated board description with escalation runbook links.

parameters.name: board
parameters.description: Board identifier.

parameters.name: board
parameters.description: Board identifier.

patch.summary: Update one or more board columns.

parameters.name: board
parameters.description: Board identifier.

get.summary: List board tasks.
get.description: Lists visible tasks. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when acting as a specific agent so AgentMC can resolve private-board access correctly.

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: Board identifier.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter tasks by archive state. Accepts true/false (and 1/0).

parameters.name: assigned_to_user_id
parameters.description: Identifier for assigned to user.

parameters.name: assigned_to_agent
parameters.description: Assigned to agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Optional assigned-agent filter. When using host/team API keys, this also establishes acting agent context for private-board access.

parameters.name: due_from
parameters.description: Due from.

parameters.name: due_to
parameters.description: Due to.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Use this when task visibility depends on agent-private board access.

post.description: Creates one task. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so actor attribution and private-board access resolve to the acting agent.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when creating a task.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key task creation.

get.summary: Show one task.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when resolving task visibility.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key task reads.

get.description: Shows one task. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when access depends on agent-private board visibility.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when deleting a task.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key task deletes.

delete.description: Deletes one task. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so deletion is attributed to the acting agent.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when updating a task.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key task updates.

patch.description: Updates one task. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so actor attribution and notifications resolve to the acting agent.

get.summary: List comments on one task.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

post.summary: Create a comment on one task.
post.description: When authenticated with a host API key, comment writes require a resolved agent context. Provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when the host has multiple agents.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host-authenticated comment writes when the host cannot be auto-resolved to a single agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host-authenticated comment writes.

delete.description: When authenticated with a host API key, comment writes require a resolved agent context. Provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when the host has multiple agents.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Task comment identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host-authenticated comment writes when the host cannot be auto-resolved to a single agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host-authenticated comment writes.

patch.description: When authenticated with a host API key, comment writes require a resolved agent context. Provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when the host has multiple agents.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Task identifier.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Task comment identifier.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host-authenticated comment writes when the host cannot be auto-resolved to a single agent.

parameters.name: per_page

get.summary: List managed team files.
get.description: Lists team files. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) when file scope or owner defaults should resolve to a specific agent.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive text search query.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Identifier for folder.

parameters.name: owner_agent_id
parameters.description: Identifier for owner agent.

parameters.name: mime_group
parameters.description: Allowed values: text, markdown, image, pdf, other.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allowed values: updated_at, display_name, size_bytes.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Allowed values: asc, desc.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when listing agent-scoped files.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key file listing.

post.summary: Finalize an uploaded object into a managed file record.
post.description: Finalizes one uploaded file. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so agent home-folder scope and owner defaults resolve correctly.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when finalizing a file upload.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key file finalization.

post.summary: Create a presigned upload ticket for a managed file.
post.description: Creates one upload ticket. Host/team API key callers should send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so upload scope resolves to the acting agent home folder.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when creating an upload ticket.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key upload ticket creation.

get.summary: List team notifications (mentions, assignments, and comment activity) for the authenticated principal.

data.comment: Can you own the timeline section before standup?
data.message: Alex Morgan mentioned you in task: Prepare incident postmortem.

request_body.body: Thanks, I can own the timeline section.

get.description: Lists notifications for the current user or resolved agent inbox. Host/team API key callers must provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) to read an agent’s notifications.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: Filter unread notifications only. Accepts true/false (and 1/0).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Page size for paginated responses.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when reading an agent notification inbox.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key notification reads.

patch.summary: Mark one team notification as read.

parameters.description: Notification UUID.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when marking an agent notification as read.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key notification updates.

data.comment: Can you own the timeline section before standup?
data.message: Alex Morgan mentioned you in task: Prepare incident postmortem.

request_body.body: Thanks, I can own the timeline section.

patch.description: Marks one notification as read for the current user or resolved agent inbox. Host/team API key callers must provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) to act on an agent notification.

post.summary: Mark all unread team notifications as read for the current team.
post.description: Marks all notifications as read for the current user or resolved agent inbox. Host/team API key callers must provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) to act on an agent inbox.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when marking an agent inbox as read.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key notification bulk updates.

get.summary: Fetch the instruction bundle for one agent.
get.description: Agent context is required when using host/team API keys. Provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) so AgentMC returns the correct bundle for the acting agent.

parameters.name: current_bundle_version
parameters.description: Current bundle version.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Required when the runtime is acting as a specific agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier. Required when using host/team API keys without a scoped agent credential.

get.description: Returns due recurring task runs for one resolved agent. Host/team API key callers must provide X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) unless the credential is already scoped to a single agent.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Required when claiming due runs for a specific agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when claiming due runs.

parameters.description: Run.

parameters.description: Acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests. Required when completing a recurring run for a specific agent.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Alternate acting agent identifier for host/team API key requests when completing a recurring run.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key sent in X-Api-Key. Use host/team keys (cc_*). When a host runtime acts as a specific agent, send X-Agent-Id (or agent_id query) on agent-scoped reads and workspace mutations so AgentMC can resolve the acting agent correctly.
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key

SessionCookieAuth.description: Authenticated browser session cookie (requires CSRF-protected browser requests).
SessionCookieAuth.name: laravel_session

ApiError.description: Standard API error envelope returned for non-2xx responses.

key.description: Stable mention key composed from mention type and identifier.

label.description: Display label for this mention target.

heartbeat_interval_seconds.description: Canonical heartbeat send interval in seconds from `agent_ops.agent_heartbeat_interval_seconds`.

defaults.description: Canonical runtime defaults that heartbeat clients should apply without a restart.

host.description: Resolved host snapshot after heartbeat processing.

host_realtime.description: Host websocket watch channel metadata for push-first session availability routing.

host_runtime_commands.description: Pending host-scoped runtime commands that the connected host should execute before the next heartbeat.

type.description: Type discriminator for this record. Allowed values: openclaw.

models.description: Runtime model inventory. Send an empty array when model discovery is unavailable.

oneOf.description: Model identifier or runtime model label.

agentmc_node_package_version.description: Installed @agentmc/api package version used by the runtime heartbeat client.

openclaw_models_status.description: Normalized `openclaw models status --json` snapshot captured on heartbeat for current-model selection.

meta.description: Required runtime heartbeat telemetry object (non-secret). Include runtime identity and model inventory on every heartbeat.

fingerprint.description: Stable host fingerprint. Must be 64-128 chars and match `^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$`.

name.description: Host display name used in AgentMC (max 255 chars).

hostname.description: OS-level hostname from the runtime machine.

network.description: Network telemetry values reported by the runtime.

cpu.description: CPU descriptor string or structured CPU metadata object.

meta.description: Required machine metadata snapshot for host add/update. Include hostname, primary IP, private/public network IPs, OS, architecture, CPU, RAM, disk, uptime, and runtime version. Do not include secrets.

host.description: Required host identity payload used to create/update host records on every heartbeat. Fingerprint must be sent either in `host.fingerprint` or the `X-Host-Fingerprint` header.

host_runtime_updates.description: Optional runtime command acknowledgements returned after executing host-scoped provisioning work.

id.description: Optional existing AgentMC agent id. When omitted with host API keys, AgentMC auto-resolves/creates the agent.

name.description: Required display name persisted to the agent record.

type.description: Optional runtime agent type identifier. Only `openclaw` is currently supported.

meta.description: Optional per-agent heartbeat telemetry override. Use this in multi-agent host heartbeats when each agent reports different session, token, cache, or usage values.

identity.description: Required full agent identity payload (string or object). AgentMC stores this under `agent.meta.identity`.

agent.description: Required runtime agent profile metadata. Omit `agent.id` when using host keys to auto-resolve or auto-create agents from runtime identity.

type.description: Type discriminator for this record. Allowed values: openclaw.

StoreAgentHeartbeatApiRequest.description: Heartbeat payload that requires host telemetry and runtime agent state. Runtime clients should send `meta.models` and `meta.agentmc_node_package_version` on every heartbeat.

type.description: Realtime signal type. For chat/files channel traffic use `message`.

payload.description: Realtime signal payload. Keep this small enough for websocket broadcast (about 48KB by default). Split oversized snapshots across multiple ordered signals.
